meta.title: Reprint Push Remote Changed
meta.description: Live source WordPress site after independent remote edits.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_content'=>'Remote edited content','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>'Remote-only announcement','post_content'=>'Created on source after pull','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'remote-edited'));
